Slice C — Eval Survey (V5.1 + Claude proposals)

0 / 50 labeled
Jump to: 1 / 50

Numeric (m²)

Counts (integer)

Categorical

Source spans (field → exact sentence)

Index (• = Claude proposal pending your verify)

V5.1 changes (2026-05-29 v2):
- permit_status split: pip → pip_pending / pip_approved.
- 22 rows have Claude-proposed labels (blue dots in index).

Workflow for proposed rows:
1. Open row → read the blue banner (proposed values + source spans + notes).
2. Verify the form values against the description.
3. Adjust if you disagree.
4. Click "Verify + Mark labeled" to confirm.

Use "Next proposal →" to walk through them in order. Autosaves to localStorage.
